implementation_tasks.details: Add a separate options snapshot path that determines the latest available daily close per underlying symbol, filters out contracts expired on or before that close, values each remaining contract once, and persists the results to a unique snapshot valuation table.
implementation_tasks.summary: Add a CLI mode that values only contracts still open at the latest available daily close and writes them to a dedicated snapshot table.
implementation_tasks.title: Implement snapshot options valuation run for unexpired contracts

implementation_tasks.details: Create a separate options run mode that finds the latest daily close available for each underlying symbol, filters out contracts whose expiration date is on or before that close, values each remaining contract once at that close, and writes the results to a dedicated snapshot table instead of the existing daily-history revaluation table.
implementation_tasks.summary: Compute one valuation per unexpired option using the most recent available daily close and persist it to a dedicated snapshot table.
implementation_tasks.title: Add a snapshot options valuation run for unexpired contracts at the latest daily close

implementation_tasks.details: On TaskComplete, persist the live pre_prompt_* values from hook-runtime-state.json into the normalized run row. This keeps utilization, margin, and estimated-token metrics available for trend analysis, budget tuning, and regression review.
implementation_tasks.summary: Copy pre-prompt budget and utilization fields into token-metrics.csv so historical analysis can use them.
implementation_tasks.title: Persist prompt-budget fields in normalized token history

implementation_tasks.details: Build an external-origin uplift pipeline for hooks, rules, skills, and workflows imported from GitHub, ClawHub, or other third-party sources. Include provenance tracking, static manifest checks, sandboxed behavioral validation for executable assets, and regular update checking against upstream sources. Follow-up steps: add source provenance records, define promotion tiers, and add drift detection for updates.
implementation_tasks.summary: Create an external-origin uplift pipeline with security screening and regular update checks.
implementation_tasks.title: Add an external-origin uplift pipeline with security screening and update checking

closeout_criteria: Nelson workflows, hooks, skills, rules, and plugin-boundary behavior are inventoried.
The concept map is written in a reviewable form.
The task is committed, verified, and linked back to REC-20260414-003.
implementation_tasks.details: Inventory Nelson workflows, hooks, skills, rules, and plugin-boundary behavior so the conversion work starts from a concrete concept map.
implementation_tasks.summary: Identify the Nelson plugin concepts that need to be mapped into Codex primitives.
implementation_tasks.title: Inventory Nelson plugin concepts and orchestration

closeout_criteria: Each Nelson concept has a Codex primitive mapping or an explicit rejection reason.
The plugin package boundary is defined clearly enough to implement.
The task is committed, verified, and linked back to REC-20260414-003.
implementation_tasks.details: Map Nelson concepts to Codex workflows, hooks, skills, and rules, and specify how the plugin package should be structured.
implementation_tasks.summary: Define the Codex-native equivalents for Nelson concepts and the plugin boundary.
implementation_tasks.title: Map Nelson concepts to Codex primitives and package boundary

closeout_criteria: The Codex-native plugin package is assembled from the mapped assets.
Representative mission scenarios are validated end to end.
The task is committed, verified, and linked back to REC-20260414-003.
implementation_tasks.details: Create the plugin package boundary, wire the mapped Codex assets, and validate representative mission scenarios end to end.
implementation_tasks.summary: Assemble the Codex-native plugin package and verify mission-level behavior.
implementation_tasks.title: Package Nelson conversion and validate mission scenarios

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that classifies new backlog items, prioritizes them, and promotes only accepted recommendations into implementation work.
recommendations.summary: Classify backlog intake and keep the queue ordered by urgency and dependency.
recommendations.title: Add a backlog-triage workflow to classify and prioritize new items

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that converts accepted recommendations into implementation tasks with explicit success criteria, keeping the recommendation open until derived work closes.
recommendations.summary: Turn accepted backlog recommendations into executable tasks.
recommendations.title: Add a recommendation-to-task workflow to promote accepted recommendations into implementation tasks

recommendations.details: Create a workflow for executing implementation tasks end to end, including status updates, commit capture, verification, and closeout evidence.
recommendations.summary: Track implementation through commit and verification evidence.
recommendations.title: Add an implementation-execution workflow that updates task status, captures commit SHAs, and verifies completion

recommendations.details: Create a weekly workflow that re-sorts priorities, flags stale items, and enforces work-in-progress limits on active backlog items.
recommendations.summary: Review backlog health on a regular cadence.
recommendations.title: Add a weekly-backlog-review workflow to refresh priority, identify stale items, and enforce WIP limits

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that promotes reusable skill gaps into new or updated skills, or discovers and installs external skills when they are a better fit.
recommendations.summary: Turn repeated gaps into skill updates or installs.
recommendations.title: Add a skill-maintenance workflow for reusable skill gaps and external skill discovery

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that routes recurring failures into the systematic-debugging skill before any patching, so root causes are understood before mutation.
recommendations.summary: Make repeated failures go through a deeper debug path.
recommendations.title: Add a debug-deep-dive workflow that invokes systematic debugging before patching repeated failures

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reviews new backlog items and classifies them as recommendations, implementation tasks, or noise before they enter the active queue.
recommendations.summary: Classify incoming backlog items consistently.
recommendations.title: Add a backlog-triage skill to classify new items as recommendation, task, or noise

recommendations.details: Create a skill that decomposes accepted recommendations into implementation-ready tasks with clear acceptance criteria and manageable scope.
recommendations.summary: Break recommendations into executable units.
recommendations.title: Add a task-decomposition skill to convert recommendations into implementation-ready tasks

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reports backlog aging, active work, completion rates, and other project-health signals for regular review.
recommendations.summary: Summarize backlog health and flow metrics.
recommendations.title: Add a project-insights skill to report backlog health, aging items, WIP, and completion rates

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reviews overdue backlog items and decides whether to keep them active, defer them, or drop them from the canonical queue.
recommendations.summary: Prune or defer stale backlog items consistently.
recommendations.title: Add a stale-item-review skill to review overdue backlog items and decide whether to keep, defer, or drop them

recommendations.details: Create a skill that translates backlog items into GitHub Issues or GitHub Projects entries with clean titles, summaries, and acceptance criteria.
recommendations.summary: Write backlog items into GitHub issue/project surfaces.
recommendations.title: Add an issue-writing skill to turn backlog items into GitHub Issues or GitHub Projects entries cleanly

recommendations.details: Trim the session-start guidance so the Superpowers overlay primes behavior without becoming a heavy always-on context payload.
recommendations.summary: Reduce startup overhead and keep the primer lean.
recommendations.title: Keep the Superpowers startup hook minimal so it primes behavior without loading a large always-on payload

recommendations.details: Add rules that keep runtime policy in core Codex and reserve Superpowers skills for behavior-shaping content, not execution control.
recommendations.summary: Clarify which layer owns policy versus behavior.
recommendations.title: Add rules that prefer core runtime skills for policy and Superpowers skills for behavior-shaping work

recommendations.details: Add rules that force verification and review before any work can be marked complete or closed out in the backlog.
recommendations.summary: Make review and verification mandatory before completion.
recommendations.title: Add rules that require verification and review before marking work complete

recommendations.details: Add rules that keep one canonical backlog, separate recommendations from tasks, and close recommendations only after derived tasks are committed and verified.
recommendations.summary: Keep backlog data canonical and type-separated.
recommendations.title: Add rules for single-source-of-truth backlog management and for separating recommendations from implementation tasks

recommendations.details: Keep skill loading metadata-only by default so workflows only pull full skill bodies when they explicitly need more context.
recommendations.summary: Minimize loaded skill context by default.
recommendations.title: Keep metadata-only skill loading as the default unless a workflow explicitly needs more context

recommendations.details: Extend skill-gap handling so repeated reusable gaps can become new skills or external installs, instead of only being recorded as memory.
recommendations.summary: Promote repeated gaps into reusable skills.
recommendations.title: Expand skill-gap promotion so reusable gaps become new skills or external installs, not just memory entries

recommendations.details: Add a bootstrap check that verifies the Superpowers submodule is present and initialized for fresh clones before any workflow depends on it.
recommendations.summary: Fail fast if the Superpowers submodule is missing or uninitialized.
recommendations.title: Add a lightweight bootstrap check for the submodule so fresh clones initialize superpowers cleanly

recommendations.details:
The runtime classified this prompt as a reusable skill gap.

Target: create_skill
Source prompt:
I have a knowledge gap and want to extract skill from this recurring pattern.

Promote the reusable behavior into a skill or install an existing external skill.
recommendations.summary: Create reusable skill from a reusable skill gap.
recommendations.title: Promote reusable skill gap: I have a knowledge gap and want to extract skill from this recurring pattern.

recommendations.details: Build an external-origin uplift pipeline for hooks, rules, skills, and workflows imported from GitHub, ClawHub, or other third-party sources. Include provenance tracking, static manifest checks, sandboxed behavioral validation for executable assets, and regular update checking against upstream sources. Follow-up steps: add source provenance records, define promotion tiers, and add drift detection for updates.
recommendations.summary: Create an external-origin uplift pipeline with security screening and regular update checks.
recommendations.title: Add an external-origin uplift pipeline with security screening and update checking

closeout_criteria: All derived tasks for the Nelson conversion are completed and verified.
The Codex-native plugin package exists with mapped workflows, hooks, skills, and rules.
The recommendation is closed only after the linked tasks are committed and verified.
recommendations.details: Convert the Nelson plugin into a Codex-native plugin package with Codex workflows, hooks, skills, and rules mapped from Nelson's orchestration model. Follow-up steps: inventory Nelson concepts, map them to Codex primitives, package the plugin boundary, and validate mission-level scenarios.
recommendations.summary: Convert the Nelson plugin into a Codex-native plugin package.
recommendations.title: Convert the Nelson plugin for use with Codex

recommendations.details: Investigate and fix the slowdown in the daily metrics loop. The most likely regression is repeated metrics-table DDL and the staging-table copy path inherited from the metrics primary-key change. Recommended fix: stop recreating the staging table with INCLUDING ALL, avoid repeated table-creation checks inside save_metrics, and confirm whether profit/TEMA writes need batching or consolidation after the metrics write path is optimized.
recommendations.summary: Optimize the daily metrics loop by removing repeated DDL and staging-table index overhead.
recommendations.title: Optimize the daily metrics loop to reduce repeated DDL and staging-table overhead

recommendations.details: Ensure the canonical backlog can be read safely within a single project without surfacing items intended for other projects. Prefer one shared backlog store with an explicit project identifier or scope field on each item, and make project-local readers filter by that field. Follow-up steps: define the project_id or scope schema, preserve it through intake/promotion/closeout, and add tests proving project-local reads do not cross-pollinate.
recommendations.summary: Add project-scoped backlog isolation with explicit project identifiers.
recommendations.title: Add project-scoped backlog isolation so project reads do not cross-pollinate

recommendations.details: Create a separate options run mode that finds the latest daily close available for each underlying symbol, filters out contracts whose expiration date is on or before that close, values each remaining contract once at that close, and writes the results to a dedicated snapshot table instead of the existing daily-history revaluation table.
recommendations.summary: Compute one valuation per unexpired option using the most recent available daily close and persist it to a dedicated snapshot table.
recommendations.title: Add a snapshot options valuation run for unexpired contracts at the latest daily close

recommendations.details: Extend hook telemetry so each tool call records the tool name, duration, status, retry/fallback usage, and error category when present. The current event stream is mostly invocation counts, which is not enough to identify slow or unreliable tools.
recommendations.summary: Capture tool-level latency, success, failure, and retry signals for each invocation.
recommendations.title: Record per-tool latency and outcome telemetry

recommendations.details: Emit a small set of outcome-oriented signals for task completion, user-visible success, and error conditions. Without those fields, the current telemetry only supports internal runtime tuning and cannot clearly justify changes to existing functionality.
recommendations.summary: Add explicit outcome fields so metrics can support product decisions, not just budget tuning.
recommendations.title: Track user-outcome signals alongside runtime metrics
